LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE DBA ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND/OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND/OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE DOCTRINE OF CONTRACTUAL ASSUMPTION OF THE RISK/RELEASE DOES NOT BAR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS. THERE EXISTS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT WAS GROSSLY NEGLIGENT. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment And/Or Summary Adjudication Of Defendant Stephens Institute Dba Academy Of Art University
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE Dba Academy Of Art University's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And/Or Summary Adjudication.

Defendant Stephens Institute's motion for summary judgment and/or summary adjudication is denied in its entirety.

The doctrine of contractual assumption of the risk/release does not bar plaintiff's claims. There exists a triable issue of material fact regarding whether defendant's conduct was grossly negligent. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
